series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Occupational Safety & Health Research Program File
series_metadata.series_description: The Research Program files consist of research agreements, applications, reviewer scoring summaries, quarterly, interim and final reports, and other related files. Since files related to this program include the research agreements, or contracts, we need to retain the files in keeping with O.R.C. 2305.06, or for nine years from the date of expiration or termination of the contract.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from date of expiration or termination of contract ; Electronic: from date of expiration or termination of contract
